btnPh.name: Text Box

Text Box

ph.text: <Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Style Justification="Center" /> <Span Text="Click to edit Master title style" /> </Block> </Content> </Document>
ph.plain: Click to edit Master title style

ph.text: <Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Span Text="Click to edit Master text styles" /> </Block> </Content> </Document>
ph.plain: Click to edit Master text styles
